test_completeness.justification: Two phone-only UI fixes; each has a unit (state/class) test + a real-browser phone E2E. 0 testable-but-untested.

behaviors.behavior: #3 phone top-bar ProjectFilterDropdown fluid = content-width (max-w-[60vw]+min-w-0+truncate), not w-full
behaviors.evidence: unit ProjectFilterDropdown.test.tsx (fluid vs default className) PASSED; E2E 90-phone 'top-bar project dropdown is content-width, NOT the full bar' (ddW < bar*0.72 & <= 60vw) PASSED

behaviors.behavior: #1 phone '+ New' = flat drill-down (project list -> tap project REPLACES popup with its actions; back; action -> NewIssueModal scoped to project); no off-screen overflow
behaviors.evidence: unit ProjectCreatePhoneMenu.test.tsx (drill/back/onSelect state machine) PASSED; E2E 90-phone 'drills project -> actions in ONE downward popup, no off-screen overflow' PASSED (modal scoped to project)

enumeration_basis.basis: one behavior row per fix (#3 dropdown width, #1 drill-down); real-CSS overflow/width outcomes proven by Playwright at 393px

surface_verification.runner: BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3948 playwright test e2e/flows/90-phone-responsive.spec.ts e2e/flows/90-all-projects-create-cascade.spec.ts e2e/flows/49-project-filter.spec.ts (isolated stack: built client served by Hono, temp USERPROFILE, loopback, no Claude spawn)
surface_verification.justification: Phone (mobile-chromium/Pixel5 @393px) drill-down + dropdown-width green; desktop cascade + project-filter non-regression green.
